problems:

• Love it, no blocking issues.

- Testimonial video and “beat the clock” videos captured.

More quotes:
- How has NHS England not picked up on this? It should be rolled out everywhere! They should invest in this for the entire general practice, it’s incredible. This is the difference between needing improvement and being good in CQC. I feel like this is ChatGPT for recall. I’m going to be redundant!

They said on a call on 25 June that they don’t use it for ACT questionnaires yet and want to try it in a demo environment first. Amy made and sent them a help guide with screenshots and hope that helps.
